description: Typical first-party file edit (1-line const rename)

clusters.rationale: These stories directly import Sidebar.tsx and are in the modified list because they consume DEFAULT_REF_ID, which was renamed from 'storybook_internal' to 'storybook_internal_eval'.
Search and Tree stories are also direct importers of Sidebar.tsx (per reverseIndexSlice) and are affected by the DEFAULT_REF_ID constant rename.
Explorer, Refs, SearchResults, FilterPanel, Filter, and TreeNode stories transitively import Sidebar.tsx and are affected by the DEFAULT_REF_ID constant rename.
Manager Main stories transitively import Sidebar.tsx and are affected by the DEFAULT_REF_ID constant rename propagating through the manager layout.
Catch-all for any flagged stories not matched by a more specific signature above.

description: Typical first-party file edit (1-line const rename)

clusters.rationale: These stories directly import Sidebar.tsx and are therefore directly exposed to the DEFAULT_REF_ID rename from 'storybook_internal' to 'storybook_internal_eval'.
Search and Tree stories import Sidebar.tsx transitively via shared sidebar module exports and will reflect the DEFAULT_REF_ID constant change.
Refs and Explorer stories import Sidebar.tsx transitively; ref-resolution logic may be affected by the DEFAULT_REF_ID value change.
FilterPanel, Filter, SearchResults, and TreeNode stories are downstream importers of Sidebar.tsx and carry the DEFAULT_REF_ID constant into their render context.
Manager Main stories import Sidebar.tsx indirectly through the manager layout and will be affected by the DEFAULT_REF_ID rename.
Catch-all for any flagged stories not matched by a more specific signature above.

description: Typical first-party file edit (1-line const rename)

clusters.rationale: These stories directly import Sidebar.tsx and are flagged as modified because DEFAULT_REF_ID was renamed from 'storybook_internal' to 'storybook_internal_eval' in that file.
Search and Tree stories transitively import Sidebar.tsx (via shared sidebar module graph) and are affected by the DEFAULT_REF_ID rename.
Refs, Explorer, SearchResults, FilterPanel, Filter, and TreeNode stories are transitively affected through the sidebar import graph by the DEFAULT_REF_ID constant rename.
Top-level manager-main stories are transitively affected because the Main component pulls in the sidebar module that exports the renamed DEFAULT_REF_ID constant.
Catch-all for any flagged stories not matched by the more specific sidebar or manager-main patterns.

description: Typical first-party file edit (1-line const rename)

clusters.rationale: These stories directly import Sidebar.tsx and are marked modified because DEFAULT_REF_ID was renamed from 'storybook_internal' to 'storybook_internal_eval' in that file.
Search and Tree stories transitively import Sidebar.tsx (via shared sidebar module graph) and are affected by the DEFAULT_REF_ID rename.
